items.text:
POSZUKUJEMY DODATKOWYCH STATYSTÓW ‼️ NON-PROFIT
Amatorski film pełnometrażowy (Non profit)
GDAŃSK/TRÓJMIASTO

🎬O NAS:
Hej 👋, nazywam się Igor i od ostatnich dwóch miesięcy, kręcę z moim zespołem film pełnometrażowy pod tytułem "Perfect. Person."

Zostało mam 5 dni zdjęciowych, i okazało się, że do scen które nam zostały, potrzebujemy odrobinę więcej statystów.

Akcja rozgrywa się w szkole, więc szukamy osób który mogły odegrać rolę uczniów, prowadząc rozmowy w tle i wypełniając korytaże i ławki w klasie 🏫

🎞OPIS FILMU:
Film opowiada historię Maćka, powszechnie lubianego ucznia Liceum, który wraz z dojściem Kuby do klasy, zaczyna bać się, że znajomi zostawią go, dla nowego kolegi.

👤WYMAGANIA:
Akcja filmu rozgrywa się w liceum, przez co szukamy osób w wieku 16-18 lat. (Zdjęcia twarzy/sylwetki nie są wymagane)

🗓INFO I TERMINY:
- Spotykalibyśmy się w XV LO im. zjednoczonej europy [Pilotów 7, 80-460, Gdańsk]
- Nagrywki trwałyby od 11:00 do 15:00
- Terminy nagrań: (16.05), (24.05), (30.05), (06.06), (13.06)

🫴OFERUJEMY:
- Dostęp do wody (kranik)
- Łatwy dojazd (Tramwaj, autobus, SKM)
- Przyjazną i otwartą atmosferę :)

📞KONTAKT:
Jeżeli chcielibyście się zgłosić, albo macie jakieś pytania, piszcie pod ten numer 🫶
WHATSAPP - 506 327 242 
Liczba miejsc: 20

Scotland & Midlands
Zoom Research on Social Media & Utube

Incentive £105

Looking for 14/15 year olds who use utube and social media to give feedback and opinions by zoom. Parent /guardian must be present during both zooms

Meet & Greet Tues 5th May @ 4pm (30mins)

Main Session Tues 14th May @ 3.45pm (75mins)

Must reside in a postcode Midlands or Scotland.

Must use utube and social media 

To take part please pm me or email androullanicolaou2@gmail.com

items.text:
**ROLE FILLED**

RUSH CASTING CALL - Student Film
(Non union or union okay)

Tomorrow, May 2nd in La Mirada ($20 gas stipend) 8AM
Sunday, May 3rd in North Hollywood
COPY, CREDITS, BREAKFAST & LUNCH

RYAN - Lead supporting character. Age 25-35, male, a creative freelancer, super caring and sweet towards his long-term partner Emily but has felt a distance growing in their relationship. He goes to therapy but struggles to talk to others. Open to any ethnicity.

About the film:
When a stressed workaholic becomes invisible during her chaotic morning commute, she drifts through a world that no longer registers her existence and is forced to reconsider what she’s been missing in plain sight.

If interested in collaborating, please email  sarahniver@gmail.com with your name and contact info along with your reel and headshots. Thank you so much!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM **

**ROLE: BOB**
Male, White, Late 50s–early 60s

Bob is a traditional, working-class American husband. He’s emotionally detached, habit-driven, and comfortably unaware of his wife’s inner life. 

He is not overtly cruel—his neglect is casual, ingrained, and almost invisible. His humor is dry, dismissive, and occasionally biting without realizing the impact. There’s a subtle humanity underneath, but it rarely surfaces.

**Tone/Performance Notes:**
* Naturalistic, grounded performance (not caricature)
* Strong sense of timing for dark comedy
* Ability to play obliviousness with authenticity
* Minimal physicality; performance is largely internal and reactive

**Project Details:**
* Short film (dark comedy / psychological drama)
* Non-union / micro-budget (include rate if applicable)
* Filming in Los Angeles 
* Dates:TBD  late summer/ early fall

**To Submit:**
Please send headshot, resume, and reel (if available) to: Allamericandinner@gmail.com
Subject line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner”

items.text:
Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting for our tour of the children’s theatre show, “Tom Gates Live”, based on the popular book series by Liz Pichon.

The show is written and directed by Miranda Larson with songs and music by Barrie Bignold and is produced by Mark Thompson at MT Productions.

Production dates:

Tour dates June – Oct 2026. We are currently have 35 dates over this period. 

This production will be based around London so the successful candidate will need a base in London or the surrounding area. 

**Tom Gates (Male, 16 years - 23 years)**

Tom Gates is an easily distracted and creative 10-year-old boy who loves doodling, listening to music, and annoying his older sister, Delia.

We are looking for a musical theatre performer that can sing, perform slapstick and comedy, and can perform the role of a young boy. He needs to be strictly 5'10" tall or smaller. 

Within the show, there is basic singing, dancing and movement but nothing too technical.

 

The successful applicant will need to be comfortable assisting with the load ins/ outs and have a full UK drivers licence as they will be asked to assist driving the touring cast car.

Playing age:

16 years - 23 years

Height:

147 — 178 cm

Gender:

Male

Contract info:

Show day fee: £150

Travel day fee: £50

Subsistence: £20

Please send CV's & headshots to 

casting.mtproductions@gmail.com

items.text:
Can you play a woman who swallowed a lifetime of fury — and finally, deliberately, chose where to aim it?

https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition
Audition registration is open until 17 May
Auditions 30/31 May by appointment.

All crew/cast are unpaid roles

sharedPost.text:
Mina

She is the most competent person in every room she enters.
The men don't notice.
She makes sure of it.

Intelligent. Loyal. Practical.
Brave in a way nobody has ever been asked to see.
Pregnant — and that is not a limitation.
It never was.

She knows every rule.
She follows every one.
Not because she has to.
Because she is waiting.
She wants to run wild.
She wants to fight.
She wants to be more than they will ever let her be.

She will be.

She was raised to be a Lady.
She is also the one who ends it.

This role is the spine of the production.
It demands emotional range, physical stamina, stage combat, and sincerity that never breaks.

Can you play a woman who swallowed a lifetime of fury — and finally, deliberately, chose where to aim it?"

Auditions 30/31 May

Register now.
🔗 https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #Mina #CharacterBreakdown

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'She carried everything. The child. The doubt. The fury. The weight of being endl endlessly reasonable. Until she couldn' t. Until she could. Mina Every story ends. Not always in the way you were told.'

items.text:
Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.
items.title: Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.)

items.text:
Hi Everyone 🥳

The Eden project is only getting bigger and thus the team must grow to match. Thus far, it’s been a small team job but we are looking for passionate, skilled and committed individuals to join the team. 

If you love films, or simply loving bringing a vision to life, or knows someone who does ,  this is the place where you can sharpen your skills, build real experience and create meaningful impact.

Fill in the form here:

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdwVLyPYRv6FdcIRt6hVSfiqlanCA0GqHwCUE5Uo7xmEpxyxw/viewform?usp=header  

or email us at info.eden500@gmail.com to be a part of a winning team. 💯

Additonal bonus if you have lighting, stablising and sound equipment. Must be available in May/June May /June 2026. Please note this is an unpaid opportunity.'

Info: Virtual work only, can be based anywhere around the world. Must be available from 2026. Please note this is an unpaid opportunity.'

items.text:
An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

Not your resume. Not your training. Not your headshot.
Your soul.

Katie Doyle has spent 30 years transforming Hawaii from a filming backdrop into a real talent hub — fighting for local actors to tell their own stories on screen.

And her casting philosophy is something every actor needs to hear right now.

She is not looking for perfection. She is looking for presence. Authenticity. Generosity of spirit. The more interesting you are as a human being — the more she wants to cast you.

That is what your self-tape needs to communicate. Not a perfect read. A real human being.

Read the full story on OnSetReport — link in bio.
Ready to make sure your self-tape shows casting directors exactly who you are? Start your free 7-day trial at HowToSelfTape.com — full access, no credit card.
Link in bio 👆

items.summary:
An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

Not your resume. Not your training. Not your headshot.
Your soul.

Katie Doyle has spent 30 years transforming Hawaii from a filming backdrop into a real talent hub — fighting for local actors to tell their own stories on screen.

And her casting philosophy is something every actor needs to hear right now.

She is not looking for perfection. She is looking for presence. Authenticity. Generosity of spirit. The more interesting you are as a human being — the more she wants to cast you.

That is what your self-tape needs to communicate. Not a perfect read. A real human being.

Read the full story on OnSetReport — link in bio.
Ready to make sure your self-tape shows casting directors exactly who you are? Start your free 7-day trial at HowToSelfTape.com — full access, no credit card.
Link in bio 👆

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org
Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LIVERPOOL & NORTH WEST (UK)

Feature Film: One Man’s Land

📖 ABOUT THE FILM

One Man’s Land follows Harry, a disgraced war veteran returning home after serving time for war crimes committed during his final tour in Afghanistan.

He struggles to rebuild his life in a place that no longer feels familiar. His father is in prison, his mother has passed and his sister wants nothing to do with him. When he reconnects with an old comrade, Ken, he is drawn into a fringe far-right political movement that feeds his anger and disillusionment.

At the same time, Harry forms a fragile connection with Ruth, one of the few people who sees beyond his past.

Despite his best efforts to balance his personal feelings and his distorted views, Harry’s decisions lead him down a path of no return.

🎥 PROJECT DETAILS

• Feature film (low-budget, high-quality production)
• Flexible shoot schedule across multiple months
• Filming in Merseyside
• Non-union project
• Paid roles (flat fee, negotiated)
• Professional crew using industry-standard equipment

🎬 Auditions: May
📍 SAE Institute, Georgia House, Pall Mall, Liverpool L3 6AL
🚆 Nearest station: Moorfields

⚠️ Important
This film includes mature themes and strong language, including racist rhetoric reflective of certain characters.

🎭 ROLES

HARRY (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Former Afghan veteran. Physically fit, rough around the edges. Quiet but volatile.
Lead role with strong emotional range.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

RUTH (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Barmaid with a hidden past. Warm, likeable, emotionally guarded.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

LAURA (Late 20s – Early 30s)
North-West accent. Harry’s ex. Direct, hardened, not interested in reconnecting.

BARB (Mid – Late 50s)
North-West accent. Reclusive mother grieving her son. Approx. 1 shoot day.

PETE GOLD (Late 40s – Mid 50s)
British accent. Charismatic but manipulative far-right leader.
⚠️ Contains inflammatory dialogue reflective of the character.

ALICE (Early – Mid 20s)
North-West accent. Harry’s sister. Caring but distant. Has moved on.

DR AVERY (Mid 30s+)
Preferably female. Court-appointed therapist. Professional, empathetic.

📌 REQUIREMENTS
• Headshot
• Showreel

📩 Apply: onemanslandfilm@gmail.com

🚆 Nearest station: Moorfields

⚠️ Important
This film includes mature themes and strong language, including racist rhetoric reflective of certain characters.

🎭 ROLES

HARRY (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Former Afghan veteran. Physically fit, rough around the edges. Quiet but volatile.
Lead role with strong emotional range.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

RUTH (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Barmaid with a hidden past. Warm, likeable, emotionally guarded.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

LAURA (Late 20s – Early 30s)
North-West accent. Harry’s ex. Direct, hardened, not interested in reconnecting.

BARB (Mid – Late 50s)
North-West accent. Reclusive mother grieving her son. Approx. 1 shoot day.

PETE GOLD (Late 40s – Mid 50s)
British accent. Charismatic but manipulative far-right leader.
⚠️ Contains inflammatory dialogue reflective of the character.

ALICE (Early – Mid 20s)
North-West accent. Harry’s sister. Caring but distant. Has moved on.

DR AVERY (Mid 30s+)
Preferably female. Court-appointed therapist. Professional, empathetic.

📌 REQUIREMENTS
• Headshot
• Showreel

📩 Apply: onemanslandfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
I posted a few months back looking for advice moving forward with my son who is neurodivergent. Thanks to everyone’s advice we are now in acting classes, also my son in a specialised acting school. He’s doing theatre.  Both done short films (he got lead role) and played as featured extras in 2 credited movies for cinema release this year, also some promo work . 
Loving what we are doing and how things are going right now . So firstly wanted to see what people thought our acting age range would be. I’m 47 Dylan is 26 now. So I know what to apply for . Also  if there was any credited roles coming up I’m ready to try step into small roles but happy to do featured extra at minute if it is credited . And any more advice at this stage is welcomed, as I’m new just starting out 
Thank you

Hello everyone!

**Location: Poland, Lublin**

Exhibition **June 6-7**

I'm looking for **actors** for a performance. A** slim woman of any age**, preferably an actress with no allergies to body paint.

Terms: **TFP**

This isn't a commercial art project. In exchange for participating, I can take a few professional, classic photos for your portfolio for free.

Examples of past performances from my exhibitions can be found in the attached photos.

items.text:
**012  Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy ojca głównej bohaterki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje mężczyzny do roli ojca głównej bohaterki. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miałby od **40 – 45 lat** o rudych włosach i bez zarostu, o określonych parametrach: **obwód w klatce 100- 105, obwód pasa 90/95 cm** i **wzrost: 175 -180** . Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice** najdalej. Postać ta będzie nosić mundur polski podporucznika.Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Niestety nie zwracamy kosztów podróży. Postać mężczyzny pojawi się w pierwszym odcinku i zostanie zabita przez odział niemiecki. Pojawi się też w retrospekcji bitwy w 1919 roku z Bolszewikami gdzie zostanie ranny w nogę. Oczywiście mile widziane doświadczenie pracy z tekstem. Scenę wstępnie będziemy realizować na przełomie marca lub kwietnia.

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.  Postać szefa Ahnenerbe pojawi się w kilku odcinkach. Plan zdjęciowy mamy 09.05.26 ( Sobota ) godz. 17.00 – 22.00

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
CASTING CALL – JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)
Between Two Lives
A Solkem Studios Film
Hello, all

        I am currently seeking an understudy for the lead role of Jordan in my upcoming short film “Between Two Lives,” a faith-based, character-driven story about identity, growth, and the struggle between two different paths in life.
This role is central to the story and requires an actor who can portray emotional depth, internal conflict, and personal growth.

   ROLE: JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)

Male, mid–late 20s

Strong ability to portray emotional and internal conflict

Natural, grounded delivery (not overly theatrical)

Comfortable with faith-based themes

Casting Note:
Preferably seeking an African/Black actor for this role, but open to all qualified actors.
Note:
This role includes a few kissing scenes (non-explicit).
There is NO nudity or explicit content, but actors should be comfortable with on-screen intimacy.

       CHARACTER DESCRIPTION:
Jordan is caught between two lives—one rooted in familiar habits, past relationships, and comfort, and another leading toward growth, peace, and purpose.
His journey is emotional, reflective, and spiritual, requiring a subtle but powerful performance.

KEY PERFORMANCE ELEMENTS:

Internal struggle and quiet emotional moments

Honest, grounded dialogue

Transformation over time

Vulnerability in key scenes

Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado
Shoot Dates: July 10–12, 2026. ( MUST BE AVAILABLE THESE DATES TO SUBMIT  THANK YOU )

Production: Independent / Faith-Based Film

Compensation: Unpaid project,but will provide food, Drinks and snacks.  

On-screen credit

IMDb credit

Copy of the final film

TO SUBMIT:
Headshot
Reel or past work (if available)
Contact information
Email: reinesolkem101@gmail.com
Phone: 720-572-0029

    I'm Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a strong, meaningful story to life.

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m a colombian actress in Denver looking to build a creative crew for consistent, high-quality content in English and Spanish.

I’ve written and produced several shorts on my own that have gained some **interest on social media**, but I want to team up with others to level up our production value.

This is a **collaborative passion project, **the goal is to create professional scenes/shorts in **one-day shoots** to grow our reels, gain recognition, and eventually pitch larger funded projects together. **Students are more than welcome!**

**Interested? Please drop a comment with:**
1. What role you’d play (Writer, DP, Editor, Actor, etc.)
2. A quick note on your experience or a link to your work.

**I'd love to create something together!** ✨

FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA

Do filmu fabularnego szukam 2 dublerów. 
Wg obecnego draftu do jednej sceny od ok. godz. 10. 

- 1 Pan - wzrost 178-182 cm, rozmiar odzieży 48-50, buty 41-42 - włosy w odcieniu ciemnego blondu  (2 pierwsze zdjęcia)
- 2 Pan - wzrost 176-180 cm, rozmiar odzieży M, buty 40-41 - włosy w odcieniu ciemnego blondu (3 zdjęcie)

Stawka - 170 zł

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: DUBLER 
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wymiary, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy, tyłu głowy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia.

Od kilku miesięcy widzicie  FB Studio ABM relacje i ogłoszenia z realizacji tajemniczego serialu. Pewnie już wszyscy wiedzą , ale my dopiero dzisiaj możemy to ogłosić. Tak, to jest drugi sezon serialu PRZESMYK.  

W PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU ZAMIESZCZAMY link do formularza zgłoszeniowego. 

Zapraszamy do wypełniania go mieszkańców WARSZAWY i najbliższych okolic.  

Poszukujemy: 
komandosów - osób dobrze zbudowanych, wysokich, kulturystów, bokserów, zapaśników, judoków, doświadczonych zawodników jak i emerytowanych sportowcó. Zapraszamy panó i panie  w wieku 30-50 lat i  epizodystów - również w wieku 30-50 

Wszystkie szczegóły i stawki w formularzu zgoszeniowym. Link do niego w PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING – EPIZODYŚCI 🎬  zdjęcia w Warszawie (brak zwrotów za dojazd) 5 i 6 maja (do potwierdzenia data i informacja czy dana rola będzie miała 1 dzień czy 2 dni zdjęciowe - prosimy o zgłoszenia osoby w pełni dyspozycyjne  5 i 6 maja)

Do pilotażowego odcinka serialu fabularyzowanego (true crime / paradokument) poszukujemy epizodystów do poniższych ról:  

🔹 1. Podejrzany (epizod mówiony)  
Mężczyzna 29–35 lat, wschodni akcent/język (rosyjski/ukraiński mile widziany), dobrze zbudowany, „gangsterski” vibe.  
💰 700 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 2. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, zmęczony, niepewny, człowiek żyjący na marginesie 
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 3. Mechanik (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 39–50 lat, zwyczajny, konkretny, mile widziana ciemniejsza karnacja lub opalenizna.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 4. Rekruter (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, sprytny, kontaktowy, typ sprzedawcy.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 5. Ekspert (epizod mówiony)  
Osoba 40–65 lat, spokojny, precyzyjny głos, możliwa gra bez pokazywania twarzy.  
💰 560 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 6. Jarosław (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–35 lat, z zarostem.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 7. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
25–35 lat, ładna brunetka, naturalny wygląd.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 8. Dziewczynka (epizod niemy)  - tylko dzieci ze zgodą PIP w naszej agencji!
ok. 7 lat  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 9. Mężczyzna (epizod mówiony)  
ok. 60 lat, wschodni wygląd/język  
💰 490 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 10. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
50–65 lat, korpulentna  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 11. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna ok. 50 lat, wysoki, krępy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 12. Bezdomny (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 40–65 lat, z bujną brodą  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 13. Nadawca (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–55 lat, raczej postawny, może być typ ochroniarza  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 14. Policjant (epizod niemy)  
Funkcjonariusz / typ mundurowy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  

➡️ W tytule: PILOT  

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:  
1. Imię i nazwisko  
2. Miejsce zamieszkania  
3. Wiek  
4. Wzrost  
5. Rozmiar ubrania  
6. 2 zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka, aktualne!)  
7. Link do wizytówki / nagrania (YouTube)  
8. Podaj numer roli do której się zgłaszasz
⏰ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 01.05 do godz. 20:00  

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥

What a fantastic group of singers, voice teachers and speech therapists you are! 🙌
Today we worked intensively on larynx height, AES, cricoid and thyroid tilt, jaw and lip movement, and anchoring – and I’m already looking forward to the next days together.

Stimmtraining in Frankfurt am Main – online & vor Ort 🎤💻 | Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶

Today we dove furthermore into the fascinating world of voice anatomy, practical aspects and acoustics. Alongside all the theory, there was plenty of practice, exchange, and shared learning – with joy, curiosity, and lots of aha moments guaranteed ✨

I’m really excited for Day 4 and 5 with you 🥳
Here’s to new insights, exciting exercises, and your continued vocal growth 💪🎤💫

sharedPost.text:
Stimmtraining in Frankfurt am Main – online & vor Ort 🎤💻
Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶
Heute tauchen wir tief ein in die faszinierende Welt der Stimme 🤩
• Stimmlippen & ihre Schwingung 🎵
• Taschenfalten & ihre Funktionen 🔍
• Anatomie & Akustik verständlich erklärt 🧠
• Viel Praxis, Austausch & gemeinsames Lernen 💬
• Freude, Neugier & Aha-Momente garantiert ✨
Ich freue mich riesig auf Tag 2 mit euch 🥳
Auf neue Erkenntnisse, spannende Übungen und eure stimmliche Weiterentwicklung 💪🎤💫

📌Stimmtraining Anmeldung im Institut Rummel (Frankfurt), in Luxemburg oder Online

items.text: Casting call for a student film

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Write Up BNU Film Production students are looking for cast in an upcoming film. A post apocalyptic student short film following a girl as she awakes and tries to find her dad, whilst dealing with her uncle keeping a secret and zombies on the prowl. We are looking for actors who fit the following descriptions: Lucy (Playing age around 18) girl who wakes in the apocalypse and is determined to find her father. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th.'

May be an image of text that says 'Jim (Playing age 40s) Former military and current doomsday p person. Lucy's uncle who hides a secret from her. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th. John (Playing age 40s) Lucy's loving father. Must be available on May 15th Zombie (Playing age around 18) A zombie Lucy encounters. Must be available on May 22nd If you are interested email 22308662@bucks.ac.uk This will be unpaid work but transport and food on the shooting days will be covered. Shooting will take place at Buckinghamshire New University's High Wycombe campus.'

items.summary: Casting call for a student film
items.title: Casting call for a student film

items.text:
🎭 Singers/Actors wanted – New Musical (Demo Recording)

I’m a composer based in Gloucestershire, currently developing a new original musical, and I’m looking for a small group of singers/actors to help record a demo of a few songs.

The project: New musical (early development stage)

Piano-led score (recorded in Logic Pro)

Emotionally driven, character-focused songs.

What I’m looking for:3–5 singers / actors 

Comfortable singing solo or in small ensembles.

Musical theatre experience helpful but not essential.

Commitment: Very low pressure – a few relaxed sessions to record demo tracks.
Based around Gloucester / Hereford (flexible)

This is an unpaid, creative collaboration (for now)

Goal: To create a short demo (2–3 songs) to support development and potential showcase opportunities. 

If you’re interested (or just curious), drop me a message and I can send through a demo track and more info.

topComments.text: Hi Chris! I sent a DM!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM 🎬
We are looking for actors to be part of an exciting Afrikaans short film for a student production.

🎥 Project Type: Short Film

🗣 Language: Afrikaans

Roles:

We are casting for Afrikaans-speaking male characters. Due to the story and character backgrounds, these roles are written for Caucasian actors.

Requirements:

• Male actors

• Fluent in Afrikaans

• Passion for acting (experience is a bonus, not required)

This is a great opportunity to gain on-set experience and build your portfolio.

If you’re interested or know someone who might fit the roles, please get in touch for more details.

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL – VOLUNTEER ACTORS WANTED (Johannesburg soweto)
Hello everyone 👋
My name is Karabelo and I am currently starting a small independent YouTube filmmaking project. I am looking for people who are interested in acting in a short film for experience and creativity.
This is not a paid job — it is a voluntary opportunity for anyone who wants to gain acting experience, be part of a creative project, and appear in a YouTube short film.
🎭 No acting experience is needed — beginners are welcome.
🎬 You will be guided during filming and helped with your lines.
FRO MORE INFORMATION 
WHATSAPP NUMBER::60 883 6584 
You can also call 📞

sharedPost.text:
⚓ MALE DANCERS: ELEVATE YOUR CAREER AT SEA! ⚓
Are you a professionally trained Male Dancer with exceptional technique and a strong background in Classical Ballet and Contemporary? Ready to trade the studio for a stage that sails the world?

We are seeking polished and versatile male dancers to join our elite theatre ensembles on luxury cruise ships! This is your opportunity to perform in spectacular, high-energy productions while exploring global destinations.

The Spotlight Awaits:
Lead Performer in lavish theatre shows, dinner shows, special events, and high-impact pool shows.

Execute complex, fast-paced choreography with precision across multiple styles including Ballet, Modern, and Jazz.

Depending on suitability, integrate specialty artistic elements or routines (e.g., floor work or basic aerials) into the company's show formats.

Collaborate with the artistic team to create thrilling new performance pieces.

What We Are Looking For:
Exceptional Training: Completed certified performing arts training or similar professional qualification.

Classical Foundation: Strong professional training in Ballet, Modern, and Jazz dancing is essential.

Experience: Several years of professional stage production experience is highly desirable.

Versatility: Ability to learn choreography quickly and precisely; basic singing and acting training are a plus.

Language: Must be proficient in both spoken and written English.

Attitude: Highly motivated, a reliable team player, and focused on providing a world-class guest experience.

Don't let this opportunity sail by! Audition for a life-changing contract today.

🔗 View the full job description and APPLY NOW: https://www.5entertain.com/jobs/dancers-for-cruise-ships

#maledancer #dancerlife #CruiseShipPerformer #ballet #contemporarydance #jobsatsea #ApplyNow

We’re casting for Good Grief by Delsa Tuitea
directed by Fulisia Asalemo Tofete

 A dark comedy about family, culture, and the chaos of mourning.

A La Mama Explorations project, this is a Melbourne-based, actor-driven work — stripped back, honest, and developed through rehearsal.

We’re looking for Pacific performers across all roles who can hold both humour and emotional truth.

Acting experience preferred, but not essential.
Must be available for at least 90% of rehearsals and able to speak or confidently pronounce Samoan.

This work contains strong language and explores themes of grief, death, family conflict, and infidelity.

👉 Apply here https://forms.gle/a5kw4vgDPEg2F7Qr8

EOIs close Friday 8 May

For enquiries:
asalemo.tofete@gmail.com

items.text:
HE TRUSTED THE WRONG WORLD
AND IT BROKE HIM IN WAYS NO ONE COULD SEE.

BETRAYED BY POWER, HUNTED BY SHADOWS,
AND LEFT WITH NOTHING BUT HIS INSTINCTS—
HE VANISHED INTO THE DARK.

BUT FROM THE RUINS OF LIES AND BLOOD,
A NEW FORCE IS RISING.

COLDER. SHARPER. UNSTOPPABLE.

NOW HE’S NOT JUST SURVIVING THE SYSTEM—
HE’S REWRITING IT.

NOW HE’S BUILDING HIS OWN.

items.text:
🚨CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (NON-UNION, ATL)
Synopsis

A romantic drama that follows the lives of Tay and Ted from when they meet at 6 years old, to their adult lives as they navigate life’s obstacles without letting it tear them apart.

SVS Productions 

Non-Union

Shoot Dates: June 5th-10th, 2026

Compensation: Copy/Credit/Meals

Location: Atlanta, GA

Local Atlanta hires only.

Submission Deadline: May 6th, 2026

Available Roles:

TAY CAMERON – LEAD

Black female, ages 25–35 (must be able to portray ages 18–30 throughout the film).

Beautiful, prissy, and driven. Tay knows exactly what she wants for her future, but struggles to balance her career ambitions with her relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with the character Ted. No full make-out scenes.

TED BURGESS – LEAD

Black male, ages 25–35, 5’10” and over.

Very caring and loving. Ted deeply loves Tay but is growing tired of her consistently putting her career before their relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with Tay. No full make-out scenes.

YOUNG TED BURGESS – SUPPORTING

Black male, age 6-10. 

Ted meets Tay at this age and they develop a bond. He is caring and charismatic. 

SANDRA – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 40–50.

Ted’s mother. Outgoing, confident, and sexy.

LOGAN – SUPPORTING

Black male, ages 40–50.

Sandra’s husband. Well-dressed, educated, and polished.

GRANNY – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 60–75.

Logan’s mother and Ted’s grandmother. She helped raise Ted and played a major role in shaping him into the gentleman he is today.

Submission Instructions

Please submit headshot, resume, reel & or demo clips (if available) to: miles@svsmobb.com. Subject Line: [Role Name] Submission

Break a leg!
items.previewDescription: SVS Productions is a Multi-Media company that specializes in creating DOPE content for the world.
items.title: SVS Productions | ATLANTA | Media Production

items.text:
Vertical
Hey, temperature check:

Are there any Black/Latino actors and actresses in New York City, ages 20–45, with strong comedy chops who’d be interested in doing a vertical indie project?

Looking to shoot in May/June. This is an unpaid indie opportunity, working with experienced filmmakers. Seeking performers with sharp timing, personality, and comfort carrying comedy-driven material.

Great for actors looking to build material, collaborate, and create something fun.

If that’s you or you know someone great, drop a comment and I will DM you
items.summary:

𝗠𝗮𝘆 𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻? 𝗬𝗘𝗦! May Summer Acting with Dancing Workshop ang Acting Core sa lugar kung saan ang pag-arte at pagsayaw ang matututunan! Matuto umarte ng pang-television, film, at commercial kasama ang FAMAS actor na si 𝗔𝗱𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗖𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗱𝗼. Learn Hip-hop dance for beginners with our new instructor 𝗝𝗼𝘀𝗵𝘂𝗮 𝗟𝗶𝗺, to push your limits and unlock your full performance energy using your body. 🌴☀️

What’s inside our Summer Workshop? 
✅Acting training for Television, film, and commercials.
✅Experience being part of our workshop’s final performance, “Stranded on an Island.”
✅Basic Hip-hop dance Workshop.
✅Dance Recital at the end of the session.
✅Plus exciting surprise inclusions!

👦Open to ages 8 - 15 years old! With or without experience is okay!

📆How to enroll? Register through our GForm Link -> https://forms.gle/gT7sUTXyWC2zSv579

❗️ Reserve your slot early and get a discount! 

#actingcore #summerworkshop #workshopph

items.summary: Hvad læger virkelig siger om at spise agurk i salater hver dagTjek den første k.o.m.m.e.nt.

items.text:
*Stand up. Take your shoes off.*

*Imagine you are barefoot and the floor beneath you is ice. Every step gets harder — you feel the shock and the numbness. Where do you put your weight? How far do you dare to step?*

*Now the ice is gone. The floor is hot sand, and I mean hot like hell. You'd like both of your feet to never touch it again. But you have to keep moving, and force your feet against that hell.*

*The sand disappears. Sharp stones now. Uneven. Unpredictable. Each step is pure blood and pain.*

*And now — snakes. Everywhere. Moving. Tread carefully. Make wise decisions.*

*Notice what just happened. You didn't decide to respond. Your whole body responded — weight, breath, attention — all of it shifted without you choosing it.*

*That's the core of acting. Not deciding how to feel. Responding to what's there. When your body responds to the floor, it responds to everything — the situation, the other character, the moment.*

*Responsiveness isn't something you perform. It's something that happens when you're really in your circumstances. And it's the real gate to believing — both ends: you and the audience.*

*This is one of 24 exercises in a short practical guide — each one building on the last, from breath and relaxation all the way to full character work. No theory, just practice.*

*If you're interested in the full sequence, drop a comment or DM me.*

items.title: 🚨🚨ACTOR&ACTRESS CASTING CALLS🚨🚨

items.text:
An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

Not your resume. Not your training. Not your headshot.
Your soul.

Katie Doyle has spent 30 years transforming Hawaii from a filming backdrop into a real talent hub — fighting for local actors to tell their own stories on screen.

And her casting philosophy is something every actor needs to hear right now.

She is not looking for perfection. She is looking for presence. Authenticity. Generosity of spirit. The more interesting you are as a human being — the more she wants to cast you.

That is what your self-tape needs to communicate. Not a perfect read. A real human being.

Read the full story on OnSetReport — link in bio.
Ready to make sure your self-tape shows casting directors exactly who you are? Start your free 7-day trial at HowToSelfTape.com — full access, no credit card.

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

items.text:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

items.text:
I posted a few months back looking for advice moving forward with my son who is neurodivergent. Thanks to everyone’s advice we are now in acting classes, also my son in a specialised acting school. He’s doing theatre.  Both done short films (he got lead role) and played as featured extras in 2 credited movies for cinema release this year, also some promo work . 
Loving what we are doing and how things are going right now . So firstly wanted to see what people thought our acting age range would be. I’m 47 Dylan is 26 now. So I know what to apply for . Also  if there was any credited roles coming up I’m ready to try step into small roles but happy to do featured extra at minute if it is credited . And any more advice at this stage is welcomed, as I’m new just starting out 
Thank you

sharedPost.text:
📢 THE REVOLUTION HAS A NAME: SODIES KASI TV! 🎬🔥
Meadowlands, the wait is over. We aren't just a channel; we are the heartbeat of the 10 Zones. We are the lens of the youth, the voice of the hustle, and the home of the untold story.

⚠️ THE REALITY CHECK (Building from Zero)
We want to be 100% transparent with our community. We are a Grassroots Startup proving that you don't need a million-rand budget to have a billion-rand vision.

NO Professional Tools: We use our smartphones and our brains. 📱🧠

NO Big Budget: We are fueled by pure passion and Kasi discipline. 💸❌

NO Physical Building: The streets of Ndofaya are our studio. 🏘️🛣️
If we can start with nothing, you have no excuse to stay still!

📺 OUR PRODUCTION LINEUP (The Sodies Slate)
We are currently filming and scouting for the following shows:

MEADOWLANDS HEART & THE BLOOD COIN: Our flagship dramas. Raw, high-tension storytelling.

KASI SOUL SESSION: A safe space to vent, confess, or share your "Glow-Up" story. (Anonymity respected).

THE HUSTLE PROFILE: Highlighting the entrepreneurs of the 10 Zones.

JUNIOR QUIZ REVOLUTION: 15 Learners competing for the title of the smartest in the Kasi. 🧠🏆

KASI NEWS & YOUTH VOICE: The headlines that matter to us, by us.

THE STAGE: Showcasing DJs, Producers, Poets, and Dancers. 🎧✍️

🚀 HOW TO JOIN THE MOVEMENT
1. FOR ACTORS & CREW (The Founding 40):
We are looking for raw talent, not just resumes. If you have the heart to build this with us, apply below.
👉 APPLY HERE: [https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab]

2. FOR THE SOUL SESSION (Vents & Confessions):
To share your story or your "Before & After" Glow-Up, you must follow our professional format.
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com
(Subject: [SOUL SESSION] - Name/Alias - Zone)

3. FOR TALENT & MUSIC (DJs, Producers, Poets):
Want us to feature your craft or use your beats in our soundtracks?
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL!

Hello currently casting for a SAG-AFTRA short film “Let Him Play”

In need of the following roles:

Ryan (18)

Neurodivergent, sensitive, observant, and full

of unexpected wonder. His quirks include

tapping, wiping his nose, headphones on, masking

an extraordinary ear for music that no one has ever nurtured.

Julie (50)

A loving mother suffocated by a

failing marriage. She believes in her

boys but is trapped in survival mode.

Please send headshots and info to [lethimplayinfo@gmail.com](mailto:lethimplayinfo@gmail.com)

And we will send you instructions for self tape!

Shooting near LA in Lancaster June 27th and 28th!

topComments.text: Please email usa@zbdtalent.com we have an amazing roster of talent that fit the brief ✨

items.text: TEATRO DA TERRA estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro

sharedPost.text:
Estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro

7 a 16 Maio
quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do 
Fórum Cultural do Seixal

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal
Biblioteca Municipal
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil. 
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde em, tantas partes do mundo se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans.

com
JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA
e o projeto TÁS NA MIRA

encenação, espaço cénico
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS
vídeo
JOSÉ BUDHA
música
JAIME FILIPE
assistência de encenação
SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção
FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção, luz
PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção
TEATRO DA TERRA   2026   M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude e Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text: Hey there All Actors on Facebook. Are you tired of waiting for callbacks, producers, and directors telling you that you're good enough? I'm an award-winning indie filmmaker and I want to change that I'm currently producing a sketch comedy show with no boundaries called the "Totally Mindblowing Show" if you need free promotion or wanna get down DM or email at totallymindblowing@gmail.com

items.text: Please let friends, family and local groups know about our fantastic new course for TY students. Develop your academics and performing arts abilities in an immersive year of exploration and growth. Over 30 years experience will ensure an unforgettable year!

sharedPost.text:
📚ITW is launching a new Transition Year Musical Theatre programme in partnership with Ashfield College. Starting September 2026!
You can have a quick preview of this unique programme in this post.
More information on our website www.itwstudios.ie in our Transition Year page. You can also register your interest there. 👀

Time to start a new exciting adventure for us, forever led by our love for performing arts. 🎭

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören

Seit Jahren ist er einer der bekanntesten Dokumentar-Filmer des Landes, mit einer unüberschaubaren Liste von – auch jeder Menge – internationalen Produktionen, sodaß man ihn eigentlich gar nicht mehr vorstellen muß: Georg Riha.

Im Gespräch mit Sarah Fuchs erzählt er aus erster Hand wie sich wie seine Produktionen Form annehmen und wie sich die Arbeit und Möglichkeiten über die Jahre  geändert haben, auch am Beispiel des aktuellsten Dok-Films, der gerade in den Kinos startet:  Über Österreich

sharedPost.text:
WIOSENNE NABORY DO Connecting Arts OTWARTE!
𝙏𝘼𝙉𝙄𝙀𝘾🩷 𝙎𝙋𝙊𝙍𝙏❤️ 𝙀𝘿𝙐𝙆𝘼𝘾𝙅𝘼🧡 𝙎𝙕𝙏𝙐𝙆𝘼💛
Dołącz do naszej tanecznej rodziny i rozwijaj swoją pasję i marzenia razem z nami!

👉 Prowadzimy zajęcia dla:
- dzieci 
- młodzieży
- dorosłych

👉 Tworzymy grupy:
- rekreacyjne (dla każdego)
- reprezentacyjne (taniec sportowy)
(solo, duet, mini formacje, formacje)

To coś więcej niż taniec - to:
 🩷 rozwój
 ❤️ emocje
 🧡 scena
 💛 wspólnota

----
Nie ważne, czy dopiero zaczynasz, czy masz już doświadczenie - znajdziemy dla Ciebie odpowiednią grupę! 🙂

📩 Napisz do nas lub zadzwoń:
📞 883 290 666 / 665 033 903
📧 kontakt@connecting-arts.pl
📍https://connecting-arts.pl/

Dołącz do nas i poczuj tę energię ✨
#nabory #connecting #taniec #Łódź #sztuka #dzieci

---
Jeśli chcesz wesprzeć rozwój naszych zawodników sportowych i pomóc nam działać - uruchomiliśmy zrzutkę na Mistrzostwa Europy Serbia 2026 / WDSF:

items.text:
**Mroczne sesje**

 

Poszukuje kobiet w **wieku od 18**, górna granica nie ma znaczenia. Wykonuje sesje w stylu mrocznym wykorzystując różne gadżety i kostiumy. Szukam kobiet ,które nie boją się własnego ciała. Doświadczenie nie jest tu ważne.

Osoba zainteresowana powinna najlepiej mieszkać **w Gliwicach** lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice chyba, że ktoś jest bardzo zainteresowany i mieszka dalej to też ok. z tym,że nie zwracam za bilety.) tak aby dojazd był krótki dla niej. Sesje wykonuje tylko w Gliwicach. Po sesji i obrobieniu zdjęć, zostaną one wysłane modelce do jej wykorzystania. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**, umowa na zasadzie **TFP**

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia i maxmodel lukus_wielki2**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

sharedPost.text:
🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny rozgrywanej w pubie.

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 5 i 6 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: okolice Puszczy Kampinoskiej  

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „5-6 maja”

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– miejsce zamieszkania  
– wiek  
– wzrost  
– rozmiar ubrania  
– 2 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

items.text:
HE TRUSTED THE WRONG WORLD
AND IT BROKE HIM IN WAYS NO ONE COULD SEE.

BETRAYED BY POWER, HUNTED BY SHADOWS,

AND LEFT WITH NOTHING BUT HIS INSTINCTS—

HE VANISHED INTO THE DARK.

BUT FROM THE RUINS OF LIES AND BLOOD,

A NEW FORCE IS RISING.

COLDER. SHARPER. UNSTOPPABLE.

NOW HE’S NOT JUST SURVIVING THE SYSTEM—

HE’S REWRITING IT.

NOW HE’S BUILDING HIS OWN.

items.text:
**NOW CASTING: POLY LOVE**

TV Producers are searching for polyamorous and poly-curious people to star in their own TV Docu-series!

* *Are you in a relationship and are curious about exploring polyamory?*
* *Are you already in a polyamorous relationship?*

 

Whether you’re part of an existing **THROUPLE, QUAD, or PENTAD** OR you’re **newly exploring polyamory,***** WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU!***

**To be considered or to nominate a family, please email polytvcasting@gmail.com with the following info:**

1. Your Name(s) and Location.

2. Contact info.

3. Tell us a little bit about your family and your lives.

4. Attach some family photos.

5. Include any social media links that can help us get to know you better.

sharedPost.text:
ʙʀɪᴇꜰ #094 — ʟᴀʀɢᴇ ꜱᴄᴀʟᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟ 

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

📩 ꜰᴏʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴀᴅᴀ ᴏɴ:  +27 76 180 2729  

⚠️ ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴀᴠᴏɪᴅ ꜱᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ “ʜɪ/ʜᴇʏ” ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇꜱ — ᴏɴʟʏ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ʀᴇꜱᴘᴏɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ.

ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ɴᴏᴛ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ.

items.text:
Chętnie podejmę współpracę jako statystka (początkująca)
Cześć! Chciałabym spróbować swoich sił jako statystka. Nie mam jeszcze doświadczenia, ale jestem osobą bardzo dyspozycyjną, cierpliwą i punktualną. Interesuje mnie praca w Warszawie i okolicy.

Kilka słów o mnie:

• Wiek: 16 lat

• Wzrost: 160 cm

• Oczy: Ciemnobrązowe, wyrazista oprawa oczu.

• Włosy: Ciemne, średniej długości 

• Znaki szczególne: Okulary korekcyjne, septum oraz kolczyk w brwi

Brak doświadczenia nadrabiam dużym zaangażowaniem i chęcią do nauki. Jeśli mój profil pasuje do jakiegoś projektu, zapraszam do kontaktu w komentarzu, A ja się do Was odezwę!!
items.summary:
Chętnie podejmę współpracę jako statystka (początkująca)
Cześć! Chciałabym spróbować swoich sił jako statystka. Nie mam jeszcze doświadczenia, ale jestem osobą bardzo dyspozycyjną, cierpliwą i punktualną. Interesuje mnie praca w Warszawie i okolicy.

Kilka słów o mnie:

• Wiek: 16 lat

• Wzrost: 160 cm

• Oczy: Ciemnobrązowe, wyrazista oprawa oczu.

• Włosy: Ciemne, średniej długości 

• Znaki szczególne: Okulary korekcyjne, septum oraz kolczyk w brwi

Brak doświadczenia nadrabiam dużym zaangażowaniem i chęcią do nauki. Jeśli mój profil pasuje do jakiegoś projektu, zapraszam do kontaktu w komentarzu, A ja się do Was odezwę!!

## 🎷 CASTING: Aktor/Saksofonista (19-28 lat)

Poszukujemy odtwórcy głównej roli do filmu krótkometrażowego. Projekt **płatny**.

**KOGO SZUKAMY?**
* Mężczyzna w wieku **19–21 lat**.
* **Umiejętność gry na saksofonie** (warunek konieczny).

**ZGŁOSZENIA:** Wyślij maila na adres: **korab.karo@gmail.com**

**W treści prosimy o:**
1. Imię, nazwisko i wiek.
2. Aktualne zdjęcia (twarz i sylwetka).
3. Krótkie nagranie (self-tape), na którym przedstawiasz się i grasz dowolny fragment na saksofonie.

items.text:
W ciekawych czasach dziś nam żyć przyszło, o czym ostrzegała Warszawska Rap formacja Mor W.A. już w 2004...

Pogoniono niegdyś ''hiphopolo'' aby ustąpiło miejsca na dzisiejszy ''disko rap''. Niegdyś prawilniacy rozliczali, a dziś stoją w tej samej kolejce po zasiłek z Zaiksu i Rap w Polsce jest biesiadą. 

Kobiety mają sixpacki i chcą się bić w klatkach, jednocześnie sprzedając dupę na niebieskich platformach, a mężczyźni noszą własne torebki...

Kiedyś epidemia HIV i AIDS, a dzisiaj to ''miłość, która nie wyklucza''... 

Kiedyś Polska była wspólna, dziś jest ''lewacka'' albo ''prawacka''.

Kiedyś istniała ''Wolność Słowa i Opinii'', dzisiaj nazywa się to ''mową nienawiści''. 

Co było czarne lub białe już nie jest szare ale tęczowe...

Dzisiaj każdy kto jest opiniotwórczy kończy z łatą ''foba'' lub ''isty''...

Żydrael ciągnie za sznurki i wprowadza dyskretnie NWO we wszędobylskich aplikacjach gówna, kiczu i kurewstwa, podając to wszystko w dogodnej formie ulepionej z gliny algorytmów Sztucznej Inteligencji.

Dzisiaj wszystko jest już sztuczne. 

Miłość
 
Relacje
 
Przyjaźnie
 
Kultura
 
Polityka tego świata...

z ''intelektem'' na czele.

Zatracamy siebie na rzecz ''postępu''.

ale...

beze mnie.

cytując klasyk GRZ:

''ja dziękuję, tu wysiadam i układam się do snu.''

Pamiętajcie tylko o tym, co zawsze się liczyło, jeżeli jeszcze się coś tutaj liczy, prócz samych zysków.

Dobrego nowego tygodnia ludzie.

✊
 
fot Maciej Emka Kubacki

#śrók4uk #zfartem #truztno1

@obserwujący

items.text:
** **

**Poszukujemy mężczyzny w wieku 45 – 50 lat**

** **

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **szuka mężczyzny

 

Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej (osoby dalsza nie będą brane pod uwagę). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Postać wystąpi w 2 scenach jako niemiecki naukowiec Herman Wirth.

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

[COLL FOR MODELS] Berlin 🇩🇪 | May 30 – June 5

I’ll be in Berlin from May 30 to June 5 and I’m looking for high-quality female collaborators.
The Vision: My expertise lies in expressive portraiture and artistic nude photography, often blending the human figure with natural scenery.
While my portfolio features bold artistic nude work, I am equally open to shooting high-end portraits, fashion, or lifestyle with models who bring strong expression and creativity to the table. It’s all about the mood and the art!

Message me directly with your portfolio/IG.

IG: @hughleo1994

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CINEMATIC ARTS PROD 3 PHANTOM PAIN**

*Synopsis: After bodybuilder, Javier, breaks his arm and has to have it amputated, The Arm crawls off on a journey of its own, and after some searching, finds and attaches to Ronnie. Javier, still able to feel the arm moving, tries everything he can to either get The Arm back or move past it so he can compete to be the Juiciest Man Around. Eventually, after failing in every aspect and seeing The Arm thrive with Ronnie, Javier realizes he has to feel in order to heal. *

We had some last minute drop-outs and really need to fill our track and field team! We are filming at Harvard Gulch Park and your call time would be 4:30 PM.

Attached is a google form to fill out if you're available so we will be able to send you more information and a call sheet! 

https://forms.gle/NKksgUYCrZn38W5N9

THANK YOU IN ADVANCE!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

**ROLES:**

**Liam ***Lead*

30-39 / Trans Man

Liam is a mid 30s trans man who fled to Colorado after anti-trans legislation passed in Kansas. Assuming the family skiing cabin would be empty in the height of summer after his father’s death, he posts up there to reconnect with himself, train to hike the continental divide, and finish preparing a moth costume for his theatrical debut in Montana. He has deep commitment issues, a degree in theater, and an irrational connection to a potted plant. He didn’t plan on his brother showing up to the cabin with the law on his tail. 

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

**Jake ***Lead*

30-39 / Cis Man

Jake is a mid 30s cis man on the run from government goons. In an attempt to get out of town and clear his head, he flees to his childhood cabin in the Colorado mountains, not suspecting the sibling who abandoned him to cold and distant parents when he was teenager would already be there. A construction worker by trade whose brawling has gotten him into trouble more than once, he’s built a moat of masculine conformity around himself and only feels safe with a gun (or six) nearby. 

Performers who bring their own experience of family estrangement, blue collar culture, and LGBTQ allyship will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled aggression to honest tenderness. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Melody ***Supporting*

25-60 / Any gender with drag queen energy 

Melody is Liam’s best friend, and she is magnificent. Glamorous, funny, and deeply principled, she leads the queer cavalry into the warehouse with queenly authority and zero hesitation. She is warm to Liam in the way of found family — no conditions, no questions, just presence. She and Declan recognize each other instantly in the parking lot: two people who showed up for exactly the same reason. They walk in together, side by side, in slow motion. She is a showstopper in every scene she’s in.

Strong comedic presence and warm queenly energy. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 

* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

 **Declan ***Supporting*

30-60 / Cis Man

Declan is Jake’s blue-collar buddy who shows up, no questions asked, with a convoy of trucks behind him. He is steady, laconic, and genuinely good. When he meets Melody in the parking lot, he assesses the situation in about four seconds and makes a plan to join forces with the queer cavalry. His walk into the warehouse alongside Melody is one of the film’s key images.

Physical ease and natural authority. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 
* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Queer Cavalry ***Supporting*

25-60 / LGBTQIA+ Community Members

Eleven queers dressed for maximum ego expression pile out of five Subarus join forces with a crew of blue collar men to rescue someone they've never met — because Liam asked, and that's enough. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to stay out of it, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who bring their full selves to this. Drag queens, trans and nonbinary performers, queer folks of every flavor — if this community is yours, we want you in this scene. Strong energy and warmth, physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the blue-collar crew arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Blue Collar Crew ***Supporting*

25 - 60 / Straight Men

Eleven blue-collar workers pile out of their trucks and join forces with a cavalry of queers to walk to rescue someone they'd do anything for — because Jake is one of their own, and that's all they need to know. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to keep their heads down, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who feel lived-in and real. Construction workers, tradespeople, outdoorsmen — if this world is yours, or close to it, we want you in this scene. Physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the queer cavalry arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Goons ***Supporting*

30 - 50 / Men

Four men, broadly menacing, are the government henchmen sent to kidnap Jake. They are hired for violence, but are more invested in their spades game than in their hostage. They bicker about reneging, argue about counting, and nearly miss Jake’s escape because one slammed a jack at the wrong moment.

Character work and comedic timing are essential. The Head Goon in particular sets the tone: quietly authoritative at the card table, supremely unbothered by everything else happening around him.

Strong ensemble instincts. Ability to make a card game feel tense and funny at the same time. Comfort with prop firearms.
* Rate: ~$400 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 2 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25 - 7/26
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

items.summary:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

**ROLES:**

**Liam ***Lead*

30-39 / Trans Man

Liam is a mid 30s trans man who fled to Colorado after anti-trans legislation passed in Kansas. Assuming the family skiing cabin would be empty in the height of summer after his father’s death, he posts up there to reconnect with himself, train to hike the continental divide, and finish preparing a moth costume for his theatrical debut in Montana. He has deep commitment issues, a degree in theater, and an irrational connection to a potted plant. He didn’t plan on his brother showing up to the cabin with the law on his tail. 

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

**Jake ***Lead*

30-39 / Cis Man

Jake is a mid 30s cis man on the run from government goons. In an attempt to get out of town and clear his head, he flees to his childhood cabin in the Colorado mountains, not suspecting the sibling who abandoned him to cold and distant parents when he was teenager would already be there. A construction worker by trade whose brawling has gotten him into trouble more than once, he’s built a moat of masculine conformity around himself and only feels safe with a gun (or six) nearby. 

Performers who bring their own experience of family estrangement, blue collar culture, and LGBTQ allyship will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled aggression to honest tenderness. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props

items.text:
👉 **„Auftragsk****in“ (fiktive Filmrolle)🎬 Casting Call für Kurzfilmprojekt (Hobbyfilm)**

Wie schonmal im Januar, möchte ich nochmal auf ein Projekt hinweisen, für das wir eine Laien-Darstellerin suchen.

Wir sind eine kleine kreative Gruppe und drehen demnächst einen **Kurzfilm im Bereich Krimi/Thriller** – dafür suchen wir noch eine Darstellerin für eine besondere Rolle:

 

Gesucht wird eine Frau (ca. 25–40), die Lust hat, eine **ruhige, kontrollierte, eiskalte – aber auch leicht humorvolle Figur** zu verkörpern.

**Zum Projekt:**
• Dreh an einem Wochenende
• Gage: **400 € + Reisekosten**
• Kleines, entspanntes Team (Freunde, kein Profi-Set)

**Was uns wichtig ist:**
• Zuverlässigkeit & Lust auf eine spannende Rolle
• Natürliches Auftreten
• Interesse an Film, Krimi oder Thriller
• Eigene Ideen fürs Drehbuch sind ausdrücklich willkommen 🎬

**Wichtig zur Einordnung:**
Es handelt sich **ausschließlich um eine Schauspielrolle in einem fiktiven Kurzfilmprojekt**.

Schauspielerfahrung ist **nicht notwendig** – Motivation und Interesse zählen mehr!

📩**Interesse?**
Melde dich gerne direkt per WhatsApp oder Anruf bei Manuel:
📞 0151 55604539

Wir freuen uns auf kreative Leute, die Bock haben, etwas Cooles auf die Beine zu stellen!

In meinem Profil ist die Anzeige nochmal als Bild gepostet, da stehen noch ein paar weitere Details.

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke )

🎬 Action Performer / Physical Actor (Hannover)

Hey, ich bin Nsimba (28) und baue aktuell gezielt meine Präsenz als physischer Performer im Bereich Film & Action auf.

Mein Fokus:

– dynamische Bewegung & Körperkontrolle  

– Fight / Action-orientierte Performance  

– starke visuelle Präsenz & Charakter  

Ich interessiere mich für:

– Filmprojekte (Action, Musikvideo, experimentell)  

– Fight Choreography / Stunt-Richtung  

– Kollaborationen mit kreativen Leuten  

– Filmemacher für Action-/Fight-Szenen

– Kontakte im Bereich Stunts / Performance

Ich bringe Energie, Ausdruck und die Bereitschaft, mich voll reinzugeben.

Wenn du an Projekten arbeitest oder in die Richtung gehst → meld dich 🤝

Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden.

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien)

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten.
