items.text:
We are casting for 3 roles for our short film 'Lost Souls'. The film provides great opportunity for new and upcoming actors to test themselves in significant roles.

The film is about crack addition and the things crack addicts have to go through in order to get drugs including street prostitution.

This is non paid but you will be compensated with travel expenses and food. Plus you will also receive show reel material and a IMDB credit. The film will also feature in film festivals.

The film is a raw, unflinching and brutally honest portrayal of crack addition. We are looking for only actors who can 100% commit to their role and story lines .

Millie

Lead character, 25, white, feisty, streetwise, slim, crack addict, street prostitute. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Sienna

25, White, fun-loving, crack head, slim, street prostitute. Best friend of the lead character. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Issie

21, naive, innocent, pretty, feminine, average build, crack user. Any ethnicity. Ethnicity not important.

Please reply to blondpublishing@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
# ⚖️ ...And Justice for All (1979) 🎬

## 🎭 Overview & Setting

**...And Justice for All** is a 1979 American legal drama film directed by Norman Jewison, starring Al Pacino, Jack Warden, and John Forsythe, with the Oscar-nominated screenplay written by Valerie Curtin and Barry Levinson. It was filmed on location in Baltimore, including the actual courthouse area. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/...And_Justice_for_All_(film)) 🏛️ The film belongs to that golden era of 1970s cinema when Hollywood wasn't afraid to take on big, uncomfortable truths about American society. It blends courtroom drama with dark comedy and raw emotional intensity, creating a viewing experience that is impossible to forget. The streets of Baltimore serve as the perfect grimy, realistic backdrop for a story about a legal system crumbling under the weight of its own corruption and hypocrisy. 🌆🗽

## 👨‍⚖️ The Story of Arthur Kirkland

Arthur Kirkland, played by Al Pacino, is an idealistic defense attorney in Baltimore, known for his unwavering belief in justice and ethical conduct. The film opens with Kirkland being held in contempt of court for attacking Judge Henry T. Fleming, highlighting the deep tension between them. [Spoiler Town](https://spoilertown.com/and-justice-for-all-1979/) 😤🔥 Arthur is not your typical slick, money-hungry lawyer — he is a man who genuinely, passionately cares about the people he represents. He visits his aging grandfather every week at a nursing home, showing a warmth and personal loyalty that stands in sharp contrast to the cold, indifferent legal machine grinding away around him. 👴❤️ He is the kind of man who cannot separate his heart from his work, and it is precisely this quality that makes his eventual breakdown so powerful and heartbreaking.

## 😱 The Impossible Moral Dilemma

It is well known that Arthur hates Judge Fleming. It is because of that public knowledge that Fleming requests Arthur to be his defense attorney when he is charged with the violent rape of Leah Shepard. [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0078718/plotsummary/) 😨 This is the film's central and most devastating hook — imagin

items.text: Actors Needed!

sharedPost.text:
Casting Call - May 25th & 26th (Louisville, KY) 
PRODUCTION COMPANY: Camera Coffin Productions
PROJECT: Violent/ Spender (Music Video) 

PROJECT DETAILS:
A horror/ comedy music video (approx. 5 minutes) stylized to look like an 80's slasher film, think, Slumber party Massacre, Friday the 13th, Intruder) The video centers on a psychopath dressed in the classic 17th century plague doctor's suit (long, ankle-length overcoat, bird-like beaked mask) making his way into a crowded bar where the band is performing, leaving a blood trail behind him.

UNION?: Non-union
RATE: Unpaid (Actors will receive credit and a copy of the finished video for reel/portfolio use) 
LOCATION: Controlled indoor filming in Louisville, KY 
ADDRESS: Air Devils Inn 
2802 Taylorsville Rd, Louisville, KY, United States, 40205

SEEKING:
Plague Doctor: The Slasher Villain of the video. Anchors the psychological tension of the scene.  
1 Dart Player-  Actor with three others die by a dart to the head. Open to any gender. 
Bartender- Actor dies while serving drinks. 
SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:
Interested actors should email headshot and resume (if available) to cameracoffinproductions@gmail.com with “Plague IX – [Desired Role] – [Your Name]” in the subject line.
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION:
This is a contained interior shoot. Air Devils Inn 
2802 Taylorsville Rd, Louisville, KY, United States, 40205

sharedPost.text:
USE IT OR LOSE IT!
SCRIPT WORK -An Actors Gym.
Practice cold read and improvisation, bringing a short scene to life and learning tools to make self tapes get noticed! 
Practice is everything and playing is how we learn…. What’s not to love?
 
Dates/times are Tuesdays 11-2, Audition house,

5/12/19/26th May

£80 for four week course

Email me hello@meisnerlondon.com

#actortraining #selftapemay #actingcoach #meisnertechnique #meisnerinstitutelondon 

Yayssssss!

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

anbei unsere neuen, spannenden Workshop-Angebote für Schauspieler*innen. Die Workshops "Stunt" und "Quereinsteiger" sind für alle Berufsgruppen zugänglich. 

Alle weiteren Infos unter folgendem Link: https://www.engelspost-management.com/workshops-coachings/workshops-und-weiterbildungen/

Wir freuen uns über Eure Anmeldungen.

Viele Grüße & Happy Weekend.

Do filmu fabularnego w stylu kryminalnym na YouTube na 7 maja potrzebuję 2 mężczyzn, którzy potrafią improwizować:
Charakterystyka postaci:
- łysy
- wzrost: 170+
- wiek: 30 - 45
- czarna skórzana kurtka i spodnie dresowe
- miejsce nagrań: Warszawa
- data nagrań: 7 maj

Płatne role. Proszę wysyłać swoje doświadczenia w filmach i aktualne zdjęcie wizerunku w wiadomości prywatnej. Więcej szczegółów w wiadomości prywatnej

items.text:
Szukamy mężczyzn do udziału w krótkim filmiku w formie wywiadu:

- **Mężczyzna ok. 70-75 lat**
- **Mężczyzna ok. 50 lat z lekką nadwagą**

👉 Projekt dotyczy historii pacjentów z cukrzycą - bohaterowie odpowiadają na pytania zgodnie z przygotowanym briefem (naturalnie, własnymi słowami)

🎥 Forma: wywiad + krótkie scenki sytuacyjne (nagrania jednego dnia)
📍 Miejsce: **Suchowola (Podlasie)**
📅 Termin: od **5 - 8 maja 2026 (jeden dzień – do ustalenia)**
⏱️ Czas: ok. **6 godzin na planie**
💰 Stawka: **800 zł netto + zwrot kosztów dojazdu**

📩 Zgłoszenia (aktualne zdjęcie + krótka wizytówka) prosimy wysyłać** wyłącznie** na adres : zgloszenia.so.me@gmail.com

items.text:
Hej! Do etiudy fabularnej poszukujemy aktorów do ról głównych i drugoplanowych. Projekt non-profit  (studencki). 

1. GŁÓWNY BOHATER – WERSJA MŁODSZA (mężczyzna, 20–25 lat)
- wrażliwy, introwertyczny, inteligentny
- typ „ambitny, ale niepewny siebie”
-  naturalność przed kamerą
- umiejętność grania ciszą i subtelnym napięciem
- szczupła / średnia budowa ciała
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

2. GŁÓWNY BOHATER – WERSJA STARSZA (mężczyzna, 30–35 lat)
- ta sama postać 10 lat później
- bardziej zamknięty, zdystansowany
- widoczne doświadczenie i wewnętrzne zmęczenie
- zbliżone warunki fizyczne do młodszej wersji
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

Aktorzy grający młodszą i starszą wersję muszą być do siebie wyraźnie podobni (rys twarzy, typ urody, sylwetka).

ZDJĘCIA 25.05 , WARSZAWA 

Zapewniamy ciepły posiłek oraz dojazd na plan. Proszę zgłaszać się prywatnie.

items.text:
Anyone have experience with baby modeling in the north Jersey area? Have a one year old who smiles great and loves his picture being taken. just don’t want to get scammed from anyone 
Thanks ❤️

topComments.text:
Submit to agencies: 

Zuri 
Nymm 
State
Elevate 
Stellar 

Never  ever ever ever pay for anything other than commission fees after a job is done - which is auto taken from the agencies !  Ever

You’ll get scammed by not being with an agency-  that’s for absolute certain.
It’s not all rainbows and butterflies though! 
You have to be ready at the drop of a dime. 
It may take months for an audition or job! 
It’s a VERY competitive industry.

items.text: My daughter is looking for work, she’s 3 years old, she not great with speech but good with information retention, can follow instructions and can respond accordingly, reach out to me her mother, as I will not be allowing my daughter to do anything without me and her father’s presence,

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of baby, smiling and toy
May be an image of baby, smiling and toy
May be an image of child, smiling and toy

topComments.text:
You have to apply to agencies and get representation and get paid what you deserve to be paid.  This industry with eat these kids up and spit them out. 

There are rules with agencies such as your request. 
You can’t just post for someone to cast you-  it doesn’t work like that.  You need to do the leg work and find agencies and casting calls. 

Don’t pay a dollar for anything INCLUDING HEADSHOTS!!   Your child doesn’t need it until about 5 years old.  
Snapshots for submitting are fine. 

Take photos with a plain background or outside in natural light with nothing too busy behind her. 

You’re gonna want to be eye level with her so she’s not looking up/ 

She should be wearing solid colors as well. 

Take
1) shoulders and up, smiling with teeth - 1 smiling with no teeth 

2) waist up - smiling with teeth and 1 no smile 

3) one full body-  hands to the side-  one smiling with teeth, one without and one no smiling. 

Start submitting to agencies is the best and safest way. 

DO NOT … again… DO NOT PAY ANYONE FOR ANYTHING including photography!!

If agencies like her, they’ll sign her.

items.text:
We are casting for 3 roles for our short film 'Lost Souls'. The film provides great opportunity for new and upcoming actors to test themselves in significant roles.

The film is about crack addition and the things crack addicts have to go through in order to get drugs including street prostitution.

This is non paid but you will be compensated with travel expenses and food. Plus you will also receive show reel material and a IMDB credit. The film will also feature in film festivals.

The film is a raw, unflinching and brutally honest portrayal of crack addition. We are looking for only actors who can 100% commit to their role and story lines .

Millie

Lead character, 25, white, feisty, streetwise, slim, crack addict, street prostitute. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Sienna

25, White, fun-loving, crack head, slim, street prostitute. Best friend of the lead character. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Issie

21, naive, innocent, pretty, feminine, average build, crack user. Any ethnicity. Ethnicity not important.

Please reply to blondpublishing@gmail.com

‘Daisies’ Short Film Casting Call
Hi everyone,

I’m currently producing a short film titled ‘Daisies’, and we’re now casting.

Logline: When their affair is discovered by her violent boyfriend, a man goes on the run with his best friend while the woman he loves faces the consequences of their secret.

More information (full plot, writer’s notes, mood board):

www.writenbystokes.com 

We are casting:

* 2 Female actors (playing age 18–30)

* 2 Male actors (playing age 18–30)

(Midlands-based actors

Food and travel expenses will be provided

* Location: Birmingham

* Actors: 2 Female

* Time: From 12pm onwards

Second Shoot

* Date: TBC

* Location: Peak District

* Actors: 2 Male

* Time: Full day

A possible third shoot, depending on the other two. 

If interested, please send: 

* Headshot

* Showreel (if available)

* Your location

Email: cjamesstokes19@gmail.com

Hi everyone 👋

We’re Mangata Production, a new indie film production based in Vancouver, currently casting a **supporting female role** for a short film directed by **Regis Raffin**.

📍 **Shoot:** 1 day in June (exact date TBC)
📍 **Location:** North Vancouver (forest setting)
💰** $300 for the day**
🎬 **Non-union production**

We are looking for a **striking, model-type actress (between 20–40)** with natural confidence, and a good sense of humour! The role appears in a short, stylized and slightly surreal forest scene. Minimal dialogue.

📸 Please send:
* Headshot / standing shots
* Reel (if available) 
* Availability in June

Email us at : contact@mangata-music.com

Thanks!

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been amazed and grateful by the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, personalised plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

Please email a.to.z.infinite.8@gmail.com

Thanks! 

Food and snacks provided.

items.text:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫

items.previewDescription: Weeble Mountain is casting a photo + video shoot for a major running brand! We are looking for runners + extras. The shoot will take place in New York, NY. Casting is open to anyone who lives in the NYC area.. No modeling or acting experience required to apply. We specialize in real people casting.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL | RUNNERS | S27

We’re casting runners for a photo + video shoot for a major running brand. We need intermediate, advanced, and elite runners age 18+ across all identities. Experience with road running and good running form required. 

Pay is $2,000 for 1 day of work in New York, NY between Thu 5/28 - Wed 6/3 (1 day, TBD) with a fitting on Wed 5/27 or Tue 6/2. Must be 18+ and live in NY. Must disclose your talent agency if applicable. The advertiser’s name will be disclosed prior to booking if you are offered a role. 

We are also casting extras for this project! We need people ages 18-70 across all identities, pay is $500/day. See link for more info! 

TO APPLY:  https://www.weeblemountain.com/opencastingcalls/s27-runners

DON’T FIT THIS ROLE? Sign up for general consideration at https://weeblemountain.com/signup | We specialize in real people casting.

- 2 Pan - wzrost 176-180 cm, rozmiar odzieży M, buty 40-41 - włosy w odcieniu ciemnego blondu (3 zdjęcie)

Stawka - 170 zł

W tytule maila: DUBLER 
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wymiary, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy, tyłu głowy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia.

Widzimy się na planie!

Casting Call - Paid, Non-union

I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video.

Looking for:
• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 50-68
• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous male, age 30-49

Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:
The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face on camera. One of the products is a beard moisturizer, so please apply if you keep a clean shaved face OR a short beard that will not be shaved off. 

Location: TBD - within the Lower Mainland (easily accessible)

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with everyone’s schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 per talent for approximately 2-3 hours. 

To Apply:
Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:
• Your availability
• Recent photos or headshots
• Your location

Subject line: “product video casting”

items.text:
Hi There! I am directing a short film for Vancouver Film School titled To Blend In. We are looking for a Spanish and English speaking female and male actor for our two leads.

Filming June 3-5 in Vancouver. Union affiliation does not matter. This is an unpaid project with catering and crafty provided. Callbacks are Tuesday, May 5 and Wednesday, May 6 between 3-8pm at 151 W Cordova St.

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS: Please send a resume, headshot and demo reel if applicable to toblendin@gmail.com and indicate which role you would like to be considered for.

After surviving a xenophobic assault, a young Colombian immigrant, Laura, must choose between erasing her identity to feel safe or reaching out for help to reclaim her voice.

Laura (Spanish/English speaking woman)

Age range: 19 - 24

Laura is a young Colombian immigrant, who has ambitious dreams of moving to the United States pursuing her studies and independence. She is kind, optimistic and emotionally sensitive. After surviving a violent racist assault, fear begins to dictate her choices. She suppresses her language and changes her appearance to feel safe. Her journey is an internal struggle between survival and authenticity.

Daniel (Spanish/English male)

Age range: 20 - 25

Daniel is a Latino immigrant whose life is already established in the United States. He is respectful and grounded. His actions show comfort as he cares for Laura, wishing her to reconnect with her Latina roots. Daniel is a metaphor for the welcoming nature of the Latino community, even outside of his home.

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**JENNIFER - *****Character portrayed is Female, White, 40-50 ***

Jennifer is a mother above all else, even if it means putting her own needs to the side. When it comes to Miles, she is constantly stuck between trying to do what is best and constantly second guessing if she is doing it right. Since Miles’ father’s passing, she’s done her best to be both a Mom and a Dad, but deep down she always feels like she will never be enough. She doesn’t know how to talk about Miles’ dad, which adds an invisible tension to their relationship. When Miles gets sick, she will do anything to make sure he gets better.** LEAD ($100/day)**

**NATASHA - *****Character portrayed is Female, Mixed Japanese, 20-30***

Natasha is an only child who was brought up to be well mannered but to always stand up for herself. Her mother passed away when she was young and so growing up she was extremely close with her father Takeo. She understands what it means to hurt, because of her mother’s passing, which allows her to empathize with everyone she meets. Her intelligence not only lives in her emotional maturity but also in her intellect. Despite this, she believes the world works in mysterious ways, even when it comes to her father’s passing. **SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**JOYCIE - *****Character portrayed is Female, Japanese, 25-35***

Kiyoshi’s mom, Joycie, is a loving parent. She does her best to take care of children, despite them being interned. Her husband has been placed into forced labour of the Princeton highway and is rarely able to see them. She does her best to look out for not only her children, but all the other kids at Tashme. **1 line, 1 scene ($50/day)**

**UMP - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This umpire watches each pitch closely and calls the game with clear, authoritative “STRIKE” calls. Remains focused and impartial throughout the baseball. 2 lines, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**CATCHER - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 15-20***

This teenage catcher receives each pitch cleanly and taunts Miles quietly, trying to get in his head during the baseball game. Confident and slightly cocky, but stays locked into the play. 1 line, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET. ($50/day)**

**EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE - *****Character portrayed is Open Gender, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE rushes to get Miles into surgery at the hospital. **1 line (each), 1 scene ($50/day)**

**ADULT KIYOSHI (PHOTO DOUBLE) - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 30-50***

While Jennifer and Miles look through their family photo album, they find a photograph of Kiyoshi, standing proudly in front of their house. **($50/day)**

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**JENNIFER - *****Character portrayed is Female, White, 40-50 ***

Jennifer is a mother above all else, even if it means putting her own needs to the side. When it comes to Miles, she is constantly stuck between trying to do what is best and constantly second guessing if she is doing it right. Since Miles’ father’s passing, she’s done her best to be both a Mom and a Dad, but deep down she always feels like she will never be enough. She doesn’t know how to talk about Miles’ dad, which adds an invisible tension to their relationship. When Miles gets sick, she will do anything to make sure he gets better.** LEAD ($100/day)**

**NATASHA - *****Character portrayed is Female, Mixed Japanese, 20-30***

Natasha is an only child who was brought up to be well mannered but to always stand up for herself. Her mother passed away when she was young and so growing up she was extremely close with her father Takeo. She understands what it means to hurt, because of her mother’s passing, which allows her to empathize with everyone she meets. Her intelligence not only lives in her emotional maturity but also in her intellect. Despite this, she believes the world works in mysterious ways, even when it comes to her father’s passing. **SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**JOYCIE - *****Character portrayed is Female, Japanese, 25-35***

Kiyoshi’s mom, Joycie, is a loving parent. She does her best to take care of children, despite them being interned. Her husband has been placed into forced labour of the Princeton highway and is rarely able to see them. She does her best to look out for not only her children, but all the other kids at Tashme. **1 line, 1 scene ($50/day)**

**UMP - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This umpire watches each pitch closely and calls the game with clear, authoritative “STRIKE” calls. Remains focused and impartial throughout the baseball. 2 lines, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**CATCHER - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 15-20***

This teenage catcher receives each pitch cleanly and taunts Miles quietly, trying to get in his head during the baseball game. Confident and slightly cocky, but stays locked into the play. 1 line, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET. ($50/day)**

**EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE - *****Character portrayed is Open Gender, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE rushes to get Miles into surgery at the hospital. **1 line (each), 1 scene ($50/day)**

**ADULT KIYOSHI (PHOTO DOUBLE) - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 30-50***

While Jennifer and Miles look through their family photo album, they find a photograph of Kiyoshi, standing proudly in front of their house. **($50/day)**

items.text:
🎭 ARE YOU SPENDING HOURS IN ACTING CLASSES WITH VERY LITTLE REAL ACTING TIME?
After speaking to hundreds of actors, I keep hearing the same thing:

You spend hours in class…

but only get 15–20 minutes actually acting.

Then you’re given notes like:

“make it more believable”

“be more truthful”

“make bolder choices”

…but no one shows you how to actually do that.

No clear exercises.

No repeatable technique.

No measurable progress.

So you leave feeling frustrated, unsure what to fix, and questioning your ability.

Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and the LEAD in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I went from having no connections at 14 to signing with a top Hollywood agent at 17, moving to LA, and booking a Netflix series regular within three months.

That didn’t come from guesswork. It came from having a clear, repeatable process.

That’s exactly what my program achieves. 

I’ve created a structured acting program that breaks down the core skills you actually need, with specific exercises to build each one.

1-hour private sessions over Zoom.

In our sessions, we focus on:

• Embodying a wide range of characters in a believable, grounded way

• Creating real emotion on demand, at any intensity

• Transforming your physicality for different roles

• Learning lines quickly and retaining them with ease

• Delivering lines with clarity, confidence, and credibility

The result is an actor who knows how to step into any role with confidence and deliver emotionally impactful performances consistently.

If you’re tired of vague direction…

If you want to know exactly what skill you’re building each session…

And if you actually want to spend your time acting and making real progress…

Comment ACTING below or send me a DM 🤗

items.text:
Rainhill Garrick Society are performing ‘Allo Allo’ in October 2026. 

Based on the hugely successful British television series that ran for seven seasons, this uproarious comedy relates the adventures of a hapless cafe owner, René, in occupied France. You can see all of your favourite TV characters in the flesh, including Rene's tone-deaf wife Edith, Major-General von Klinkerhoffen and the Gestapo officer Herr Flick!

He and his wife have stashed a priceless portrait stolen by the Nazis in a sausage in their cellar, where two British airmen are also hiding until the Resistance can repatriate them. Communications with London using the wireless that is disguised as a cockatoo add to the many embarrassments this intrepid proprietor endures in the company of his patrons. News that the Führer is scheduled to visit the town inspires tricksters disguised as Hitler to frequent the cafe. Meanwhile René summons all the wit he can muster to save his cafe and his life.

Audition Dates: Tuesday 26th May (play reading)  and Thursday 28th May (audition)

Rehearsal Schedule will be Tuesdays and Thursdays, with the 3 Sundays preceding the performance

Performance Dates: 15th - 17th October 2026

Characters and Descriptions:

(Character Descriptions include accent descriptions, which the director has mentioned she can/will help with - the humour in the play can come from the exaggerated accents) 

Yvette...French..attractive young waitress having an affair with Rene.

Mimi...also French..young and preferably small. She's also madly in love with Rene as she works as a waitress in his cafe.

((Both Mimi and Yvette also supplement their income with a bit of genteel prostitution in the upstairs of the cafe.))

Leclerc ...French...middle aged...part of the resistance message carrying group and always donning disguises that are easily seen through..but he thinks they're brilliant. Could be female or male. 

Michelle..French...young.ish!? Leader of the resistance..feisty and determined. 

Col Von Strohm..German...middle aged..pompous, deluded and enjoying a cushy posting in charge of the occupation of this French village, but also incompetent.

Capt Bertorelli..Italian..any age...thinks he's God's gift to women. Deluded.

Here Fick...German gestapo leader..fanatical, inflexible deadpan humour..any age.

Helga..young..ish..typical blond German vision of female beauty. Spies for the more reasonable German  leaders on Herr Flick schemes, but she is reasonable and likeable. 

Lieut. Gruber.. any age.. German..drives a "little tank" and fancies Rene. 

General Von Schmelling..middle aged German..humourless, overbearing and ruthless.

Crabtree..English spy who speaks very funny fractured French whilst dressed as a policeman.

1st and 2nd Airmen are small parts that speak impeccable "tally-ho" type English but not seen much as they're hiding in Rene's cellar.

For more information please contact: sophie.brogan14@gmail.com

Communications with London using the wireless that is disguised as a cockatoo add to the many embarrassments this intrepid proprietor endures in the company of his patrons. News that the Führer is scheduled to visit the town inspires tricksters disguised as Hitler to frequent the cafe. Meanwhile René summons all the wit he can muster to save his cafe and his life.

Audition Dates: Tuesday 26th May (play reading)  and Thursday 28th May (audition)

Rehearsal Schedule will be Tuesdays and Thursdays, with the 3 Sundays preceding the performance

Performance Dates: 15th - 17th October 2026

Characters and Descriptions:

(Character Descriptions include accent descriptions, which the director has mentioned she can/will help with - the humour in the play can come from the exaggerated accents) 

Yvette...French..attractive young waitress having an affair with Rene.

Mimi...also French..young and preferably small. She's also madly in love with Rene as she works as a waitress in his cafe.

((Both Mimi and Yvette also supplement their income with a bit of genteel prostitution in the upstairs of the cafe.))

Leclerc ...French...middle aged...part of the resistance message carrying group and always donning disguises that are easily seen through..but he thinks they're brilliant. Could be female or male. 

Michelle..French...young.ish!? Leader of the resistance..feisty and determined. 

Col Von Strohm..German...middle aged..pompous, deluded and enjoying a cushy posting in charge of the occupation of this French village, but also incompetent.

Capt Bertorelli..Italian..any age...thinks he's God's gift to women. Deluded.

Here Fick...German gestapo leader..fanatical, inflexible deadpan humour..any age.

Helga..young..ish..typical blond German vision of female beauty. Spies for the more reasonable German  leaders on Herr Flick schemes, but she is reasonable and likeable. 

Lieut. Gruber.. any age.. German..drives a "little tank" and fancies Rene. 

General Von Schmelling..middle aged German..humourless, overbearing and ruthless.

Crabtree..English spy who speaks very funny fractured French whilst dressed as a policeman.

1st and 2nd Airmen are small parts that speak impeccable "tally-ho" type English but not seen much as they're hiding in Rene's cellar.

For more information please contact: sophie.brogan14@gmail.com
items.title: Rainhill Garrick Society are performing ‘Allo Allo’ in October 2026.
